hr.learning_development.text: Allow learners to do a self-assessment and conduct a learning needs analysis with the centre leader referencing the Technical Skills and Competencies tied to their roles
Assess and track learners' progress in building their Technical Skills and Competencies
Browse course catalogue, search/ sort available courses/ training based on feedback ratings and sign up for courses/ training
Can your solution keep a record of the company's staff and corresponding skillsets in order to support the deployment of relevant staff to affected job functions during peak periods
Create and assign learning paths/ workflows for different learners' profiles with courses and plans customised for each profile
Does your solution specify the Skills Proficiency levels in accordance with the SkillsFuture Framework
Provide feedback (quantitative/ qualitative) for attended courses, viewable by other users

Provide profile view, schedule and progress chart / plan based on the relevant Technical Skills and Competencies to map training/development and update the plan based on training attended. When applicable, include data sync to One@ECDA for Continuing Professional Development (CPD) hours tracking
Recommend courses/ learning content based on learning needs and if applicable, allow for users to flag out courses to be notified when there are available classes for registration
Submit comments/assignments, access files/ materials, retrieve performance certificates or grades e.g. remarks for observation records

Push messages or notifications to employees automatically of own work shift
Track overall scheduling and generate attendance and overtime reports
